menu_fog.note: FogExp2(0x1a2030, 0.012) was already set on scene at line 600 from cycle 26. No change needed.

changes: Introduced FoamPatchResult interface { group: THREE.Group; update: (t: number) => void }
createFoamPatches() now returns FoamPatchResult instead of plain THREE.Group
Each foam mesh gets userData.baseY (original y=-1.8) and userData.phase (i * 0.42 radians) at creation
update(t) iterates group.children and sets mesh.position.y = baseY + Math.sin(t*1.5 + phase) * 0.003
Wired into main update() loop: foam.update(elapsedTime) alongside ocean, clouds, spray
Added scene.add(distantSilhouette) in initMainMenu() after foam group
Pure depth silhouette — no displacement, no detail — matches stormy horizon aesthetic
